mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS total_students, COUNT(ssc.id) AS total_score_records, COUNT(DISTINCT sem.id) AS semester_count, ROUND(AVG(ssc.score), 2) AS average_score, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ssc.score >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(ssc.id), 0), 2) AS pass_rate FROM student_score ssc JOIN student s ON s.id = ssc.student_id JOIN course co ON co.id = ssc.course_id JOIN semester_info sem ON sem.id = ssc.semester_id

SELECT c.college_name AS name, ROUND(AVG(ssc.score), 2) AS average_score, COUNT(ssc.id) AS sample_count FROM student_score ssc JOIN student s ON s.id = ssc.student_id JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = s.class_id JOIN major m ON m.id = ci.major_id JOIN college c ON c.id = m.college_id GROUP BY c.id, c.college_name ORDER BY average_score DESC, sample_count DESC, c.college_name ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.major_name AS name, ROUND(AVG(ssc.score), 2) AS average_score, COUNT(ssc.id) AS sample_count FROM student_score ssc JOIN student s ON s.id = ssc.student_id JOIN class_info ci ON ci.id = s.class_id JOIN major m ON m.id = ci.major_id GROUP BY m.id, m.major_name ORDER BY average_score DESC, sample_count DESC, m.major_name ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT co.course_name AS name, ROUND(AVG(ssc.score), 2) AS average_score, COUNT(ssc.id) AS sample_count FROM student_score ssc JOIN course co ON co.id = ssc.course_id GROUP BY co.id, co.course_name ORDER BY average_score DESC, sample_count DESC, co.course_name ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CASE WHEN ssc.score >= 90 THEN '90-100' WHEN ssc.score >= 80 THEN '80-89' WHEN ssc.score >= 70 THEN '70-79' WHEN ssc.score >= 60 THEN '60-69' ELSE '60以下' END AS label, COUNT(ssc.id) AS count, CASE WHEN ssc.score >= 90 THEN 1 WHEN ssc.score >= 80 THEN 2 WHEN ssc.score >= 70 THEN 3 WHEN ssc.score >= 60 THEN 4 ELSE 5 END AS sort_order FROM student_score ssc GROUP BY label, sort_order ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT 'phone' AS field_key, '手机号' AS field_label, SUM(CASE WHEN ss.phone IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ss.phone) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS filled_count, COUNT(s.id) AS total_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ss.phone IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ss.phone) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(s.id), 0), 2) AS coverage_rate FROM student s LEFT JOIN student_sensitive ss ON ss.student_id = s.id UNION ALL SELECT 'email' AS field_key, '邮箱' AS field_label, SUM(CASE WHEN ss.email IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ss.email) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS filled_count, COUNT(s.id) AS total_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ss.email IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ss.email) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(s.id), 0), 2) AS coverage_rate FROM student s LEFT JOIN student_sensitive ss ON ss.student_id = s.id UNION ALL SELECT 'id_card' AS field_key, '身份证号' AS field_label, SUM(CASE WHEN ss.id_card IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ss.id_card) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS filled_count, COUNT(s.id) AS total_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ss.id_card IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ss.id_card) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(s.id), 0), 2) AS coverage_rate FROM student s LEFT JOIN student_sensitive ss ON ss.student_id = s.id UNION ALL SELECT 'family_income' AS field_key, '家庭收入' AS field_label, SUM(CASE WHEN ss.family_income IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS filled_count, COUNT(s.id) AS total_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ss.family_income IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(s.id), 0), 2) AS coverage_rate FROM student s LEFT JOIN student_sensitive ss ON ss.student_id = s.id

WITH latest_assignment AS ( SELECT mra.role_id AS role_id, mp.sensitive_field_id AS sensitive_field_id, mp.masking_type AS masking_type, mtd.type_name AS masking_type_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY mra.role_id, mp.sensitive_field_id ORDER BY mra.id DESC, mp.id DESC ) AS rn FROM masking_rule_assignment mra JOIN masking_policy mp ON mp.id = mra.policy_id LEFT JOIN masking_type_dict mtd ON mtd.type_code = mp.masking_type WHERE mra.enabled = 1 ), effective_policy AS ( SELECT sf.column_name AS column_name, COALESCE(la.masking_type_name, dtd.type_name, COALESCE(la.masking_type, dp.masking_type)) AS masking_type_name, CASE WHEN la.role_id IS NULL THEN '默认策略' ELSE '角色策略' END AS policy_source FROM sensitive_field sf LEFT JOIN latest_assignment la ON la.sensitive_field_id = sf.id AND la.role_id = #{roleId} AND la.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN masking_policy dp ON dp.sensitive_field_id = sf.id AND dp.is_default = 1 LEFT JOIN masking_type_dict dtd ON dtd.type_code = dp.masking_type WHERE sf.enabled = 1 AND sf.table_name = 'v_student_profile' AND sf.column_name IN ('phone', 'email', 'id_card', 'family_income') ) SELECT '手机号' AS field_label, FN_MASK_BY_ROLE(#{roleId}, 'v_student_profile', 'phone', '13812345678') AS masked_value, ep.masking_type_name AS masking_type_name, ep.policy_source AS policy_source FROM effective_policy ep WHERE ep.column_name = 'phone' UNION ALL SELECT '邮箱' AS field_label, FN_MASK_BY_ROLE(#{roleId}, 'v_student_profile', 'email', 'abc_student@example.com') AS masked_value, ep.masking_type_name AS masking_type_name, ep.policy_source AS policy_source FROM effective_policy ep WHERE ep.column_name = 'email' UNION ALL SELECT '身份证号' AS field_label, FN_MASK_BY_ROLE(#{roleId}, 'v_student_profile', 'id_card', '510101199901011234') AS masked_value, ep.masking_type_name AS masking_type_name, ep.policy_source AS policy_source FROM effective_policy ep WHERE ep.column_name = 'id_card' UNION ALL SELECT '家庭收入' AS field_label, FN_MASK_BY_ROLE(#{roleId}, 'v_student_profile', 'family_income', '156800') AS masked_value, ep.masking_type_name AS masking_type_name, ep.policy_source AS policy_source FROM effective_policy ep WHERE ep.column_name = 'family_income'
